name: My claim for repetitive stress illness was denied because no 'accident'—help in Saint George?
description: No accident needed for repetitive illnesses.[3]

mainEntity.name: My claim for repetitive stress illness was denied because no 'accident'—help in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: No accident needed for repetitive illnesses.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Occupational diseases don't need a single accident; prove gradual work causation.[3] Utah/Idaho cover repetitive conditions without discrete events.[3] Key factors: (1) doctor linking to duties; (2) work predominance; (3) rebut denial. Appeal with expert report. Preserve job descriptions. Lawyer overturns common denials.
